name: Crispy Cajun Red Bean & Bacon Burgers
headline: with Potato Wedges & Secret Sauce
description: Our chefs are taking Meatless Mondays seriously with these oh-so-delicious Cajun-spiced bean patties. They’re super hearty with mashed kidney beans, Monterey Jack cheese, and scallions—cooked until golden brown and crispy—served on toasted brioche buns, then layered with pickles and slathered with our secret sauce. And we can’t forget about a burger's BFF, a side of crispy potatoes. Get ready to ask yourself “Who needs meat, anyway?”
